summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of the Employee Birthday Notification feature. All 17 backend pytest cases pass (settings GET/PUT, today, upcoming, wish validation, duplicate-wish rejection, DOB update validation/404, notifications gating at 11AM IST, dismiss persistence). All critical frontend flows pass: Birthday Spotlight widget renders on dashboard with confetti, NotificationBell shows badge and opens dropdown, dismiss removes notification, Send-a-wish modal works from spotlight, /admin/birthdays page loads with settings + bulk DOB editor, toggle and upcoming-window changes fire PUT /api/birthdays/settings. HR user also sees spotlight + bell + Birthdays sidebar link.

issues: Console hydration warnings: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>'. Caused by Visual Editor's data-ve-dynamic wrapper around the <option value={d}> map in BirthdaySettings.js around line 174-181. Cosmetic — does not affect functionality but pollutes console. Consider switching <select> to a shadcn/ui Select component or hardcoding option list to avoid the dynamic wrapper.

passed_tests: GET /api/birthdays/settings returns enabled + upcoming_window_days
PUT /api/birthdays/settings accepted for admin and hr
GET /api/birthdays/today returns leadership@ethara.ai with is_today=true, tagline, department, wish_count
GET /api/birthdays/upcoming?days=7 returns hr@ethara.ai sorted by days_until
POST /api/birthdays/wish rejects self-wish (400)
POST /api/birthdays/wish rejects non-birthday recipient (400)
POST /api/birthdays/wish rejects duplicate sender on same day (400)
POST /api/birthdays/wish success on fresh send (200)
GET /api/birthdays/wishes/{email} returns wish with sender info
PUT /api/users/{email}/dob rejects invalid date format (400)
PUT /api/users/{email}/dob rejects invalid month (400)
PUT /api/users/{email}/dob persists and reflects in /upcoming
PUT /api/users/{email}/dob returns 404 for unknown user
Endpoints require auth (401/403)
GET /api/notifications returns birthday notification for admin (after 11AM IST)
GET /api/notifications returns birthday_self for leadership
POST /api/notifications/{id}/dismiss persists (notification absent on subsequent GET)
Dashboard renders [data-testid=birthday-spotlight-widget] for admin
Spotlight card [data-testid=birthday-spotlight-leadership@ethara.ai] displays name, tagline, department, wish_count
Confetti animation triggers on first render
Upcoming birthdays list [data-testid=upcoming-birthdays-list] shows HR Manager 'in 3 days'
NotificationBell [data-testid=notification-bell-button] visible with badge count 1
Clicking bell opens [data-testid=notification-dropdown]
Dismiss button removes notification from list immediately and persists (next reload still hidden)
Send a wish opens [data-testid=wish-modal] with avatar/name/department header
Wish modal Send button triggers POST /api/birthdays/wish (duplicate gives toast as expected)
Admin sidebar has [data-testid=admin-birthdays-nav-link] 'Birthdays' link
/admin/birthdays loads with settings panel (toggle + upcoming-window select + coverage card) and employee table
Toggle [data-testid=toggle-birthday-enabled] fires PUT /api/birthdays/settings twice (off+on)
Upcoming-window [data-testid=select-upcoming-window] change fires PUT
Employee table has dob-input-{email} + save-dob-{email} for every user; coverage shows 6/11 (55%)
HR user sees spotlight widget, notification bell, and Birthdays sidebar link
action_items: (Optional / cosmetic) Replace <select> + .map(<option>) in /app/frontend/src/pages/BirthdaySettings.js (~lines 174-181) with shadcn/ui Select to silence the hydration warning caused by the Visual Editor's <span data-ve-dynamic> wrapper being injected inside <select>/<option>.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/notifications endpoint correctly gates on IST hour >= 11; returns next_at hint when before — clean.
Wish duplicate check uses (recipient_email, sender_email, date_key) compound — correct and idempotent across day boundaries.
_parse_dob does NOT validate Feb-30 / Apr-31 — accepts any month 1-12 and day 1-31. Low-risk but a real calendar.validate would be safer (e.g., datetime.strptime). Optional improvement.
Save DOB UI button on /admin/birthdays only triggers PUT when value actually changes — correct behaviour but no toast/state when no-op; minor UX nit.
Confetti fires every dashboard mount when today.length>0 (confettiFired ref is per-component) — acceptable but consider sessionStorage flag to avoid replay on navigation back to dashboard.

NotificationBell handleWish dispatches a global window event 'open-birthday-wish' — works only while BirthdaySpotlight is mounted (i.e. on /dashboard). If user clicks 'Send a wish' from bell on a different route, nothing happens. Consider lifting the WishModal to a global provider.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all critical flows (spotlight, bell, dismiss, wish, admin page, toggle, window-select)

seed_data_creation: Re-asserted leadership DOB=1995-05-20 and hr DOB=2000-05-23 at end of run (matches today=2026-05-20 in IST). dismissed_notifications collection cleared at end so reruns start clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All birthday endpoints + frontend integration verified. Suite /app/backend/tests/test_birthday_feature.py is reusable for regression. To rerun: `cd /app && export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) && pytest backend/tests/test_birthday_feature.py -v`. Note: test_dismiss_persists dismisses admin's today-birthday notification — `db.dismissed_notifications.delete_many({})` is run at the end of this iteration to keep state clean for the next testing agent. Leadership has self-birthday notif (birthday_self type) which is the only one for that user. Frontend toast tests rely on sonner toaster — no special config needed.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs to RCA. Two minor observations: (1) <span> inside <select>/<option> hydration warning comes from Visual Editor's data-ve-dynamic wrapper, not the codebase itself; can be mitigated by using a Select component instead of native <select>. (2) Saving a DOB to an unchanged value sends no PUT — correct behaviour, just no UX feedback.
